new_terms.context: NVIDIA's platform for offloading KV Cache to address memory bottlenecks in long-context inference.
The previous branding for what is now known as the CMX platform.
NVIDIA's reference storage rack architecture designed to complement Vera Rubin compute racks.
An intermediate storage tier in the inference memory hierarchy between DRAM (G3) and shared storage (G4).
Specific hardware modules found within the STX storage box architecture.
ConnectX-9 network interface cards used in the STX reference design.
Vera Rubin compute racks that are complemented by STX storage solutions.
